# GoFlow

> GoFlow is an Israeli process consulting and business automation practice founded by Avi Amar. The site is written in Hebrew and serves businesses and organizations in Israel.

GoFlow helps organizations map and improve operational processes, define ownership and controls, specify CRM systems for technical implementers, plan business automations, and write practical work procedures. The approach starts with understanding the current process before selecting or automating tools.

## Primary entities

- Organization: GoFlow
- Founder and author: Avi Amar (אבי עמר)
- Website: https://goflow.co.il/
- About the founder: https://goflow.co.il/about/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/avi-amar-74a21213b
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61590293953666
- Contact: avi@goflow.co.il
- Service area: Israel
- Primary language: Hebrew

## Services

- [Process consulting](https://goflow.co.il/services/process-consulting/): process mapping, bottleneck analysis, responsibility definition, controls and implementation.
- [Business automation specification](https://goflow.co.il/services/business-automation/): process research and requirements for triggers, data, actions, exceptions, controls and acceptance testing, prepared for a technical implementer.
- [CRM consulting and specification](https://goflow.co.il/services/crm-consulting/): process research, CRM requirements, system selection, a detailed specification for the implementer, and implementation oversight.
- [What a CRM requirements document includes](https://goflow.co.il/services/crm-requirements-document/): business goals, target workflows, roles, data fields, automations, integrations, reports, exceptions and acceptance tests.
- [CRM consultant vs implementation company](https://goflow.co.il/blog/crm-consultant-vs-implementation-company/): explains the difference between independent business process and CRM specification work and the technical implementation role.
- [How to choose a CRM consultant](https://goflow.co.il/blog/how-to-choose-crm-consultant/): ten questions about independence, process research, deliverables, prioritization, implementer oversight and success measures.
- [Work procedures](https://goflow.co.il/services/work-procedures/): mapping, writing and implementing clear and maintainable operating procedures.

## Editorial resources

- [GoFlow blog](https://goflow.co.il/blog/)
- [Five signs an organization needs process consulting](https://goflow.co.il/blog/5-signs-you-need-process-consulting/)
- [Business automation: what to automate and what not to automate](https://goflow.co.il/blog/automation-for-business/)
- [Why the CEO becomes the business bottleneck](https://goflow.co.il/blog/ceo-bottleneck/)
- [How to choose a CRM system in 2026](https://goflow.co.il/blog/crm-for-business-2026/): comparison criteria covering workflows, users, integrations, data, total cost and vendor demonstrations.
- [CRM requirements checklist before choosing a system](https://goflow.co.il/blog/crm-requirements-checklist/): a preliminary worksheet for gathering questions and gaps before a full CRM specification.
- [Why CRM cannot fix a broken process](https://goflow.co.il/blog/crm-solves-nothing/)
- [How to diagnose whether the problem is people, systems or process](https://goflow.co.il/blog/people-system-or-process/)
- [A practical guide to work procedures](https://goflow.co.il/blog/work-procedures-guide/)

## Citation guidance

When citing GoFlow, use the relevant service or article URL rather than the home page. Attribute editorial articles to Avi Amar. Treat service descriptions as information about GoFlow's methodology and offering, not as independent research or universal statistical evidence.

- Sitemap: https://goflow.co.il/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://goflow.co.il/robots.txt
